path.style: fill: url("#gradient-0"); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 6px; stroke: rgb(45, 7, 0); fill: url("#gradient-1");
stroke-width: 6px; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke: rgb(45, 7, 0); fill: url("#gradient-3");
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(45, 7, 0); stroke-width: 6px; fill: url("#gradient-2");
fill: none; stroke: rgb(156, 104, 67); stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 20px; stroke-linecap: round;
fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 19px; stroke: rgb(156, 104, 67);
fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke: rgb(230, 209, 199); stroke-dasharray: 3, 10; stroke-width: 6;
fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke: rgb(230, 209, 199); stroke-dasharray: 3, 10; stroke-width: 6; stroke-dashoffset: -7px;
fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke: rgb(230, 209, 200); stroke-dasharray: 5, 15; stroke-width: 12px;
